auth.account_locked: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts. Try again later or reset your password.
auth.oauth_state_invalid: Invalid OAuth callback. Please retry the sign-in flow from the start.
auth.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again in a moment.
auth.sso_exchange_invalid: SSO exchange code is invalid or has expired
auth.sso_email_missing: SSO provider did not return an email address

project.requires_tasks_for_configured: Project must have at least one task before it can be marked as configured.

project.insufficient_balance: Insufficient account balance to publish this project.
project.invalid_task_price: Project cannot be published — every task must have a price greater than zero.
project.recall_transaction_not_found: Original publication transaction not found for recall refund.
project.cannot_be_deleted: Only draft, setting-up, or configured projects can be deleted.
project.code_already_exists: A project with this code already exists for your business.

task.already_assigned: This task is already assigned to a consultant.
task.project_not_in_progress: Tasks can only be managed for in-progress projects.
task.result_forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action on this result.
task.result_not_assignee: Only the consultant assigned to this task can manage its results.
task.result_file_not_owned: One or more attached files do not belong to you or do not exist.
task.result_empty_update: Provide remarks or file_ids to update.

task.attachment_forbidden: You do not have permission to manage attachments on this task.
task.attachment_file_not_owned: One or more attached files do not belong to you or do not exist.
task.attachment_invalid_status: Attachments cannot be modified for tasks in this status.

payment.transaction_not_owned: You do not have access to this transaction.
payment.transaction_not_pending: This transaction cannot be modified in its current state.

database.unique_violation: A record with these values already exists

billing.invoice_already_paid: This invoice has already been paid.

file.size_exceeded: File exceeds the maximum allowed size.

file.dimensions_exceeded: Image dimensions exceed the maximum allowed.

notification.forbidden: You do not have access to this notification.

ai_provider_key.cipher_failed: Failed to encrypt or decrypt an AI provider key.

chat_session.not_active: Cannot modify a chat session that is not active.

ai_context.derived_html_forbidden: Derived AI context fields must be plain text — HTML markers are not accepted.

idempotency.body_mismatch: Idempotency-Key reused with a different request body.

project_status.price_gate_failed: Cannot transition to configured: one or more tasks have price = 0.
